Functions and utilities for boot management, error handling, firmware storage, logging, and system resets.


## Files
- **[bootbits.c](bootbits.c.md)**: Functions for managing boot bits and bootloader version in the Pebble firmware.
- **[bootbits.h](bootbits.h.md)**: Defines boot bit values and functions for managing boot state in the Pebble firmware.
- **[die.c](die.c.md)**: Handles software failure by optionally halting for inspection or triggering a system reset.
- **[die.h](die.h.md)**: Declares a function to handle software failure resets without setting a reboot reason.
- **[firmware_storage.c](firmware_storage.c.md)**: Functions for reading and validating firmware descriptions from flash storage.
- **[firmware_storage.h](firmware_storage.h.md)**: Utilities for reading and validating firmware images stored in flash memory.
- **[logging.h](logging.h.md)**: Defines logging macros and log levels for the Pebble firmware, with optional verbose logging.
- **[passert.c](passert.c.md)**: Handles assertion failures and out-of-memory errors with debug serial output and system reset.
- **[passert.h](passert.h.md)**: Assertion macros and functions for error handling and debugging in the Pebble firmware.
- **[reset.c](reset.c.md)**: Functions for preparing and executing a system reset on the Pebble firmware platform.
- **[reset.h](reset.h.md)**: Functions for performing system resets, including a safe reset and a hard reset.
- **[retained.c](retained.c.md)**: Manages retained memory with CRC validation and read/write operations.
- **[retained.h](retained.h.md)**: Defines constants and functions for managing retained registers in the Pebble firmware.
